summary: Project: Chennai Retail E-Commerce static HTML site. Adding structured data (JSON-LD schemas) and SEO meta tags to all HTML pages, plus creating sitemap.xml and robots.txt.
currentTask: Implement structured data and SEO improvements across all HTML pages
plan: 1. Read all existing HTML files to understand structure 2. Add Organization schema to all pages 3. Add BreadcrumbList schema to each page 4. Add Product schema to product.html 5. Add canonical URLs, OG tags, Twitter cards, robots meta 6. Create sitemap.xml 7. Create robots.txt
